case_title: THE HERTZ CORPORATION VS. CORALEE SHIELDS et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-24-2014 CONTINUED TO NOV-26-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-06-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-26-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HERTZ CORPORATION

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HERTZ CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SHIELDS, CORALEE DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-23-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-19-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-30-2014
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HERTZ CORPORATION ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-23-2014 CONTINUED TO SEP-24-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-06-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
